an3.100:1.2: ‘In whatever way a person makes kamma, that is how it is experienced,’ there is no living of the holy life, there is no opportunity for the right ending of stress.
an3.100:1.4: ‘When a person makes kamma to be felt in such & such a way, that is how its result is experienced,’ there is the living of the holy life, there is the opportunity for the right ending of stress.
an3.100:1.5: There is the case where a trifling evil deed done by a certain individual takes him to hell.
an3.100:1.6: There is the case where the very same sort of trifling deed done by another individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:2.1: Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual takes him to hell?
an3.100:2.2: There is the case where a certain individual is undeveloped in body, undeveloped in virtue, undeveloped in mind, undeveloped in discernment: restricted, small-hearted, dwelling with suffering.
an3.100:2.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual takes him to hell.
an3.100:3.1: Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment?
an3.100:3.2: There is the case where a certain individual is developed in body, developed in virtue, developed in mind, developed in discernment: unrestricted, large-hearted, dwelling with the immeasurable.
an3.100:3.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:4.1: Suppose that a man were to drop a salt crystal into a small amount of water in a cup.
an3.100:4.3: Would the water in the cup become salty because of the salt crystal, and unfit to drink?”
an3.100:4.6: There being only a small amount of water in the cup, it would become salty because of the salt crystal, and unfit to drink.”
an3.100:4.7: “Now suppose that a man were to drop a salt crystal into the River Ganges.
an3.100:4.9: Would the water in the River Ganges become salty because of the salt crystal, and unfit to drink?”
an3.100:4.12: There being a great mass of water in the River Ganges, it would not become salty because of the salt crystal or unfit to drink.”
an3.100:5.1: In the same way, there is the case where a trifling evil deed done by one individual (the first) takes him to hell;
an3.100:5.2: and there is the case where the very same sort of trifling deed done by the other individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:6.1: Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual takes him to hell?
an3.100:6.2: There is the case where a certain individual is undeveloped in body, undeveloped in virtue, undeveloped in mind, undeveloped in discernment: restricted, small-hearted, dwelling with suffering.
an3.100:6.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual takes him to hell.
an3.100:7.1: Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment?
an3.100:7.2: There is the case where a certain individual is developed in body, developed in virtue, developed in mind, developed in discernment: unrestricted, large-hearted, dwelling with the immeasurable.
an3.100:7.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:8.1: There is the case where a certain person is thrown into jail for half a dollar [kahāpaṇa], is thrown into jail for a dollar, is thrown into jail for one hundred dollars.
an3.100:8.2: And there is the case where another person is not thrown into jail for half a dollar, is not thrown into jail for a dollar, is not thrown into jail for one hundred dollars.
an3.100:9.1: Now what sort of person is thrown into jail for half a dollar… for a dollar… for one hundred dollars?
an3.100:9.2: There is the case where a person is poor, of little wealth, of few possessions.
an3.100:9.3: This is the sort of person who is thrown into jail for half a dollar… for a dollar… for one hundred dollars.
an3.100:10.1: And what sort of person is not thrown into jail for half a dollar… for a dollar… for one hundred dollars?
an3.100:10.2: There is the case where a person is wealthy, with many belongings, many possessions.
an3.100:10.3: This is the sort of person who is not thrown into jail for half a dollar… for a dollar… for one hundred dollars.
an3.100:10.4: In the same way, there is the case where a trifling evil deed done by one individual
an3.100:10.6: and there is the case where the very same sort of trifling deed done by the other individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:11.1: Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual takes him to hell?
an3.100:11.2: There is the case where a certain individual is undeveloped in body, undeveloped in virtue, undeveloped in mind, undeveloped in discernment: restricted, small-hearted, dwelling with suffering.
an3.100:11.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual takes him to hell.
an3.100:12.1: Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment?
an3.100:12.2: There is the case where a certain individual is developed in body, developed in virtue, developed in mind, developed in discernment: unrestricted, large-hearted, dwelling with the immeasurable.
an3.100:12.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:13.3: It’s just as when a goat butcher is empowered to beat or bind or slay or treat as he likes a certain person who steals a goat, but is not empowered to beat or bind or slay or treat as he likes another person who steals a goat.
an3.100:14.1: Now, when what sort of person has stolen a goat is the goat butcher empowered to beat him or bind him or slay him or treat him as he likes?
an3.100:14.2: There is the case where a person is poor, of little wealth, of few possessions.
an3.100:14.3: This is the sort of person who, when he has stolen a goat, the goat butcher is empowered to beat or bind or slay or treat as he likes.
an3.100:15.1: And when what sort of person has stolen a goat is the goat butcher not empowered to beat him or bind him or slay him or treat him as he likes?
an3.100:15.2: There is the case where a person is wealthy, with many belongings, many possessions; a king or a king’s minister.
an3.100:15.3: This is the sort of person who, when he has stolen a goat, the goat butcher is not empowered to beat or bind or slay or treat as he likes.
an3.100:15.4: All he can do is go with his hands clasped before his heart and beg:
an3.100:15.5: ‘Please, dear sir, give me a goat or the price of a goat.’
an3.100:15.6: In the same way, there is the case where a trifling evil deed done by one individual takes him to hell;
an3.100:15.7: and there is the case where the very same sort of trifling deed done by the other individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:16.1: Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual takes him to hell?
an3.100:16.2: There is the case where a certain individual is undeveloped in body, undeveloped in virtue, undeveloped in mind, undeveloped in discernment: restricted, small-hearted, dwelling with suffering.
an3.100:16.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual takes him to hell.
an3.100:17.1: “Now, a trifling evil deed done by what sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment?
an3.100:17.2: There is the case where a certain individual is developed in body, developed in virtue, developed in mind, developed in discernment: unrestricted, large-hearted, dwelling with the immeasurable.
an3.100:17.3: A trifling evil deed done by this sort of individual is experienced in the here & now, and for the most part barely appears for a moment.
an3.100:18.2: ‘In whatever way a person makes kamma, that is how it is experienced,’ there is no living of the holy life, there is no opportunity for the right ending of stress.
an3.100:18.4: ‘When a person makes kamma to be felt in such & such a way, that is how its result is experienced,’ there is the living of the holy life, there is the opportunity for the right ending of stress.”
